basic_details.job_title: Shipping Corporation of India Hindi Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: The Shipping Corporation of India Ltd. (SCI)
basic_details.short_information: The Shipping Corporation of India Ltd. (SCI) Hindi Officer Notification 2026 has been released in July 2026 on the official website www.shipindia.com. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the SCI Hindi Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit (as on 01.06.2026): Maximum 35 years (Date of Birth on or after 01.06.1991) | consolidated emoluments: ₹92,500/- per month (includes employee's Provident Fund contribution) with 3% annual increment
qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Hindi with English as compulsory/elective subject OR Master's in English with Hindi as compulsory/elective OR Master's in any subject with Hindi/English as medium/compulsory subject (multiple combinations as per detailed advertisement)
qualification.experience: Relevant experience in Official Language implementation, Hindi documentation, translation, and administrative work in Hindi is preferred

how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates should visit the official SCI website (www.shipindia.com) and follow the detailed application procedure given in the full advertisement. Submit the online application with all required documents, certificates, and details before the closing date.
For detailed instructions and application format, refer to the official notification available on the SCI website.
important_instructions: The position is purely on contract basis and does not confer any right for absorption or permanent employment. Consolidated emoluments include employee's Provident Fund contribution. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further selection process (interview etc.). SCI reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason. Candidates must ensure they fulfill all eligibility criteria before applying.

all_official_links.label: Download SCI Hindi Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SCI Hindi Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: The Shipping Corporation of India Ltd. (SCI), a Navratna Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways, is the largest Indian shipping company operating in nearly all segments of shipping. SCI invites applications from eligible Indian nationals for the post of Hindi Officer on Contract to be posted at Mumbai. Download SCI Hindi Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

rows.details: Maximum 35 years (Date of Birth on or after 01.06.1991)

Master's Degree in Hindi with English as compulsory/elective subject OR Master's in English with Hindi as compulsory/elective OR Master's in any subject with Hindi/English as medium/compulsory subject (multiple combinations as per detailed advertisement)
Relevant experience in Official Language implementation, Hindi documentation, translation, and administrative work in Hindi is preferred
₹92,500/- per month (includes employee's Provident Fund contribution) with 3% annual increment

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SCI Hindi Officer 2026
content_sections.text: For detailed instructions and application format, refer to the official notification available on the SCI website.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The position is purely on contract basis and does not confer any right for absorption or permanent employment. Consolidated emoluments include employee's Provident Fund contribution. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further selection process (interview etc.). SCI reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason. Candidates must ensure they fulfill all eligibility criteria before applying.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SCI Hindi Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should regularly check the official SCI website for the exact closing date (Advt. No. HR 04/2026).

faq.question: Q2. How many Hindi Officer vacancies are announced by Shipping Corporation of India?
faq.answer: 01 vacancy (Unreserved category) on contract basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Hindi Officer on Contract at SCI?
faq.answer: Consolidated emoluments of ₹92,500 per month with 3% annual increment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for SCI Hindi Officer post as on 01.06.2026?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years (Date of Birth on or after 01.06.1991).

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for SCI Hindi Officer?
faq.answer: Master's Degree in Hindi/English or any subject with Hindi/English as compulsory/elective subject or medium of examination at degree level (detailed combinations available in advertisement).

faq.question: Q6. Where will the selected Hindi Officer be posted in SCI?
faq.answer: Mumbai (Corporate Office).

faq.question: Q7. Is the SCI Hindi Officer position permanent or on contract?
faq.answer: It is a contractual position with consolidated pay.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of work for Hindi Officer in Shipping Corporation of India?
faq.answer: Implementation of Official Language Policy, Hindi correspondence, translation, documentation, and promoting Hindi in official work.

faq.question: Q9. Does the SCI Hindi Officer salary include Provident Fund?
faq.answer: Yes, consolidated emoluments include employee's Provident Fund contribution.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for Shipping Corporation of India Hindi Officer vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Visit the official website www.shipindia.com, download the detailed advertisement, and follow the online application procedure.
